series_metadata.series_title: Driver Exam Station and Commercial Driver Examination Station Sign-In
series_metadata.series_description: To record the names of persons contacting a DX station in person for a driver license examination. (BMV 5804 Driver Examination Station Sign-In and BMV 5806 Commercial Driver License Examiner Log).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for two (2) years plus current, and then destroy. If transferred to electronic copy, it may be destroyed. Upon purchase from customer, the BASS system produces the HP-105, Receipt for Salvage Inspection. Retain for calendar year plus current and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) years plus current, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
